<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''[NoS] Nitrous Oxide System'''

== Backround ==
The [NoS] clan was created back in January of 05', but had been under a different tag (H2O, N2O) before January, until they finally turned into [NoS].
Most of the leaders and members are originally from H.K.

== Members ==
=== Leaders ===
* [NoS] :D.Ambush: (Droplet)
* [NoS] :O.SPyDA: (:O2aNGE:)
* [NoS] :B.OxYGeN (:BLuE:)

=== Regular members ===
* [NoS] Sycon
* [NoS] Baby-Yale
* [NoS] H.FiR3FlY (Hellfire)
* [NoS] Remix

== Rules ==
* Only leaders can recruit
* Members must be skilled in non-combo and over 25% lt
* Have fun
* Play fair
* No camping
* No double clanning
* No ceiling hanging
* Be active

== Settings ==
* Mods: All mods.
* Levels: All levels.
* Loading Time: 25lt and over.

== Clan Wars ==
[NoS] vs [Osp] 0:2

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721164341/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Nitrous_Oxide_System -->
